question: factures entre 2026-01-01 et 2026-01-07
sql_query:
SELECT
        f.ref AS facture_ref, 
        s.nom AS client,
        f.total_ht,
        f.total_ttc,
        f.datef AS date_facture
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    WHERE f.datef BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC

question: total ventes janvier 2026
sql_query:
SELECT 
        DATE_FORMAT(f.datef, '%Y-%m') AS mois, 
        SUM(f.total_ht) AS CA_HT, 
        SUM(f.total_ttc) AS CA_TTC
    FROM m38h_facture f
    WHERE YEAR(f.datef) = :year 
      AND MONTH(f.datef) = :month
    GROUP BY mois

question: clients ayant plus de 2 commandes
sql_query:
SELECT c.rowid AS client_id,
           c.nom AS client_nom,
           COUNT(co.rowid) AS nb_commandes
    FROM m38h_societe c
    JOIN m38h_commande co ON co.fk_soc = c.rowid
    WHERE c.entity = 1
    GROUP BY c.rowid, c.nom
    HAVING nb_commandes > :min_commandes
    ORDER BY nb_commandes DESC

question: produits stock faible
sql_query:
SELECT p.ref AS produit_ref, 
           p.label AS produit_nom, 
           p.stock AS stock_disponible 
    FROM m38h_product p 
    WHERE p.stock < :stock_min
      AND p.entity = 1
    ORDER BY p.stock ASC

               f.ref AS facture_ref,

sql_query:

        f.ref AS facture_ref,
        s.nom AS client,
        f.total_ht,
        f.total_ttc,
        f.datef AS date_facture,
        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,

question: factures non payées
sql_query:
SELECT
        f.ref AS facture_ref,
        s.nom AS client,
        f.total_ht,
        f.total_ttc,
        f.datef AS date_facture,
        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
error: LIMIT clause required

question: factures non payees
sql_query:
SELECT
        f.ref AS facture_ref,
        s.nom AS client,
        f.total_ht,
        f.total_ttc,
        f.datef AS date_facture,
        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

question: clients ayant plus de 2 commandes
sql_query:
SELECT c.rowid AS client_id,
           c.nom AS client_nom,
           COUNT(co.rowid) AS nb_commandes
    FROM m38h_societe c
    JOIN m38h_commande co ON co.fk_soc = c.rowid
    WHERE c.entity = 1
    GROUP BY c.rowid, c.nom
    HAVING nb_commandes > :min_commandes
    ORDER BY nb_commandes DESC
    LIMIT 100

question: clients ayant plus de 5 commandes
sql_query:

           COUNT(co.rowid) AS nb_commandes
    FROM m38h_societe c

    WHERE c.entity = 1
    GROUP BY c.rowid, c.nom
    HAVING nb_commandes > :min_commandes
    ORDER BY nb_commandes DESC

question: factures non payées

        f.ref AS facture_ref,
        s.nom AS client,
        f.total_ht,
        f.total_ttc,
        f.datef AS date_facture,
        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant

    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f

question: clients ayant plus de 2 commandes
sql_query:
SELECT c.rowid AS client_id,
           c.nom AS client_nom,
           COUNT(co.rowid) AS nb_commandes
    FROM m38h_societe c
    JOIN m38h_commande co ON co.fk_soc = c.rowid
    WHERE c.entity = 1
    GROUP BY c.rowid, c.nom
    HAVING nb_commandes > :min_commandes
    ORDER BY nb_commandes DESC
    LIMIT 100

question: clients ayant plus de 5 commandes
sql_query:

        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

    FROM m38h_facture f
    WHERE YEAR(f.datef) = :year

      AND f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY mois
    LIMIT 100

    f.total_ttc,

    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

           p.stock AS stock_disponible 
    FROM m38h_product p 
    WHERE p.stock < :stock_min
      AND p.entity = 1
    ORDER BY p.stock ASC
    LIMIT 100

question: Chiffre d'affaires de janvier 2026
sql_query:
SELECT 
        DATE_FORMAT(f.datef, '%Y-%m') AS mois, 
        SUM(f.total_ht) AS CA_HT, 
        SUM(f.total_ttc) AS CA_TTC
    FROM m38h_facture f
    WHERE YEAR(f.datef) = :year 
      AND MONTH(f.datef) = :month
      AND f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY mois
    LIMIT 100

question: Factures entre 2026-01-01 et 2026-02-28
sql_query:
SELECT
        f.ref AS facture_ref, 
        s.nom AS client,
        f.total_ht,
        f.total_ttc,
        f.datef AS date_facture
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    WHERE f.datef BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date
      AND f.entity = 1
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

question: Factures non payées
sql_query:
SELECT
        f.ref AS facture_ref,
        s.nom AS client,
        f.total_ht,
        f.total_ttc,
        f.datef AS date_facture,
        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

question: clients ayant plus de 2 commandes
sql_query:
SELECT c.rowid AS client_id,
           c.nom AS client_nom,
           COUNT(co.rowid) AS nb_commandes
    FROM m38h_societe c
    JOIN m38h_commande co ON co.fk_soc = c.rowid
    WHERE c.entity = 1
    GROUP BY c.rowid, c.nom
    HAVING nb_commandes > :min_commandes
    ORDER BY nb_commandes DESC
    LIMIT 100

    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

question: factures non payees
sql_query:
SELECT
        f.ref AS facture_ref,
        s.nom AS client,
        f.total_ht,
        f.total_ttc,
        f.datef AS date_facture,
        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

question: factures non payees

        f.total_ht,
        f.total_ttc,
        f.datef AS date_facture
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    WHERE s.nom = :client
      AND f.entity = 1
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

question: factures non payees
sql_query:
SELECT
        f.ref AS facture_ref,
        s.nom AS client,
        f.total_ht,
        f.total_ttc,
        f.datef AS date_facture,
        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

    FROM m38h_societe c

question: chiffre d affaires de janvier 2026
sql_query:
SELECT 
        DATE_FORMAT(f.datef, '%Y-%m') AS mois, 
        SUM(f.total_ht) AS CA_HT, 
        SUM(f.total_ttc) AS CA_TTC
    FROM m38h_facture f
    WHERE YEAR(f.datef) = :year 
      AND MONTH(f.datef) = :month
      AND f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY mois
    LIMIT 100

question: donne moi les factures entre 2026-02-01 et 2026-02-28
sql_query:
SELECT
        f.ref AS facture_ref, 
        s.nom AS client,
        f.total_ht,
        f.total_ttc,
        f.datef AS date_facture
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    WHERE f.datef BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date
      AND f.entity = 1
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

question: combien de factures non payees y a t il
sql_query:
SELECT
        f.ref AS facture_ref,
        s.nom AS client,
        f.total_ht,
        f.total_ttc,
        f.datef AS date_facture,
        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

question: combien de factures non payees y a t il
sql_query:
SELECT
        f.ref AS facture_ref,
        s.nom AS client,
        f.total_ht,
        f.total_ttc,
        f.datef AS date_facture,
        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f

    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

        s.nom AS client,
        f.total_ht,
        f.total_ttc,
        f.datef AS date_facture
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    WHERE f.datef BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date
      AND f.entity = 1
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

question: factures non payées
sql_query:
SELECT
        f.ref AS facture_ref,
        s.nom AS client,
        f.total_ht,
        f.total_ttc,
        f.datef AS date_facture,
        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

question: total ventes 2026-01
sql_query:

        DATE_FORMAT(f.datef, '%Y-%m') AS mois, 
        SUM(f.total_ht) AS CA_HT, 
        SUM(f.total_ttc) AS CA_TTC
    FROM m38h_facture f
    WHERE YEAR(f.datef) = :year 
      AND MONTH(f.datef) = :month
      AND f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY mois
    LIMIT 100

    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING 
        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) > 0
        AND (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

        f.datef AS date_facture,
        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

        COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0) AS montant_paye,
        (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) AS montant_restant
    FROM m38h_facture f
    LEFT JOIN m38h_societe s ON f.fk_soc = s.rowid
    LEFT JOIN m38h_paiement_facture pf ON pf.fk_facture = f.rowid
    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

    WHERE f.entity = 1
    GROUP BY 
    f.rowid,
    f.ref,
    s.nom,
    f.total_ht,
    f.total_ttc,
    f.datef
    HAVING (f.total_ttc - COALESCE(SUM(pf.amount), 0)) > 0
    ORDER BY f.datef ASC
    LIMIT 100

question: produits avec stock inferieur a 5
sql_query:
SELECT p.ref AS produit_ref, 
           p.label AS produit_nom, 
           p.stock AS stock_disponible 
    FROM m38h_product p 
    WHERE p.stock < :stock_min
      AND p.entity = 1
    ORDER BY p.stock ASC
    LIMIT 100
